query:
-- Add missing columns to user_profiles table
ALTER TABLE user_profiles 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shortTermGoals TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS longTermVision TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS personalityNotes TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS avatarEmoji VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT '🌟',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS preferredName VARCHAR(100);

-- Verify the table structure
DESCRIBE user_profiles;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user UbcpEQhTnXTazXN.root --database LQwmD5t86EFFZjkEDkXbgz --execute 
-- Add missing columns to user_profiles table
ALTER TABLE user_profiles 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shortTermGoals TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS longTermVision TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS personalityNotes TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS avatarEmoji VARCHAR(8) DEFAULT '🌟',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS preferredName VARCHAR(100);

-- Verify the table structure
DESCRIBE user_profiles;
